---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an integration, metadata capability, safety rule, or scanner improvement.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What agent-readiness problem should this solve?

## Proposed behavior

What should AgentNav generate, scan, annotate, or score?

## Target users

Who needs this? React developers, Next.js developers, AI-agent builders, SEO teams, agencies, or another group?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The behavior is documented.
- [ ] The behavior has tests.
- [ ] Sensitive actions remain conservative by default.
